title: Help with Monday API for health check
excerpt: Hello, i am integrating Monday API in my nodejs backend. I am implementing an health check for it and i also need to implement it for Monday API calls so i would need a monday api endpoint to do it and if it does not exi…

posts.author: simonepesce (Simone Pesce)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, i am integrating Monday API in my nodejs backend. I am implementing an health check for it and i also need to implement it for Monday API calls so i would need a monday api endpoint to do it and if it does not exist i would need an alternative solution. I saw that monday has a status page but i didn’t find anything about an health check or ping endpoint…

Thanks for the reply

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @simonepesce,

Welcome to the community!

We do not have a specific endpoint or resolver for a health check. Check out this article for more info about running a health check!

Let us know if you have any other questions.

Best,
Rachel
